message:
Running command: 
LIBPID=$(ps aux | grep librelane | grep -v grep | awk '{print $2}' | head -1)
ORPID=$(ps aux | grep openroad | grep -v grep | awk '{print $2}' | head -1)

echo "=== LibreLane $LIBPID ==="
cat /proc/$LIBPID/syscall 2>/dev/null
cat /proc/$LIBPID/status 2>/dev/null | grep -E "(State|Threads)"

echo ""
echo "=== OpenROAD $ORPID ==="
cat /proc/$ORPID/syscall 2>/dev/null | head -c 10
cat /proc/$ORPID/status 2>/dev/null | grep State

echo ""
echo "=== LibreLane threads ==="
for tid in $(ls /proc/$LIBPID/task/ 2>/dev/null); do
    SC=$(cat /proc/$LIBPID/task/$tid/syscall 2>/dev/null | head -c 5)
    ST=$(cat /proc/$LIBPID/task/$tid/status 2>/dev/null | grep "^State:" | awk '{print $2}')
    echo "  TID $tid: syscall=$SC state=$ST"
done

ORPID=$(ps aux | grep openroad | grep -v grep | awk '{print $2}' | head -1)

cat /proc/$ORPID/syscall 2>/dev/null | head -c 10

echo ""

    SC=$(cat /proc/$LIBPID/task/$tid/syscall 2>/dev/null | head -c 5)
    ST=$(cat /proc/$LIBPID/task/$tid/status 2>/dev/null | grep "^State:" | awk '{print $2}')
    echo "  TID $tid: syscall=$SC state=$ST"
done
", "timeout": 10}
function.name: execute_bash
